title: Straame - Strong Brown Premium Wooden Coat Hangers - Made with Natural Wood and Non-Slip Trouser Coat Jacket Hangers Pants Bar - Extra Smooth Finish - Strong Shoulder Notches (Pack of 40)
features: WIDE SHOULDER DESIGN: The coat hangers' wide shoulder design gives your suits, coats, and other types of clothing plenty of support, uniformly distributes the weight of the clothing, and protects collars and drapes to keep suits and coats in their custom-fit shape. Your tops and dresses won't fall to the ground anymore. The space on each end of the hanger will securely secure the straps of your clothing. Nothing will fall off the hanger again.

STURDY METAL HOOK: The Straame Wooden Hangers have a sturdy metal hook that can be rotated 360 degrees, allowing you to position them whatever you need. The handy hangers make your life simpler because you won't need to take your things off to organise your wardrobe. The trouser bar and notches on these hangers allow for additional hanging storage options.

MULTIPURPOSE HANGERS: Your clothing won't catch, tear, or rip thanks to the smooth lacquered wood surface. Perfect for suits, slacks, coats, also suitable for tank tops, dresses, belts, nightgowns, shawls, and skirts and ideal for homes and stores. While saving space, you may also improve the appearance of your closet. For anyone who wants their wardrobe to seem stylish and organised, these hangers are a wonderful addition.

PROTECTIVE NON-SLIP BAR: These Wooden Hangers for clothing feature an anti-slip bar to keep your pants in place. Keep the interior of your closet neat and organised, free of unsightly creases in your clothing. It is the ideal thing to mix your suits quickly and put together your look for the day in the mornings.

LIGHTER STANDARD HANGERS FOR EVERYDAY LIFE: These beautifully finished hardwood hangers are a great improvement over wire and plastic hangers. Your closet will have a luxurious and eco-friendly feel thanks to its natural wood color and stylish design. Even ordinary items that everyone uses and requires can be sophisticated and durable. Product Approx. Dimensions are H23 x W44 (cm)
